ancestorTitles: Test 1: Registering an asset posts DR Asset Account / CR AP or Bank — balanced
assertionResults.fullName: Module 5 - Fixed Assets Acceptance Tests Test 1: Registering an asset posts DR Asset Account / CR AP or Bank — balanced should create asset and post balanced journal entry
assertionResults.title: should create asset and post balanced journal entry

ancestorTitles: Test 2: Straight-line depreciation posts correctly and stops at salvage value
assertionResults.fullName: Module 5 - Fixed Assets Acceptance Tests Test 2: Straight-line depreciation posts correctly and stops at salvage value should post monthly depreciation and stop at salvage value
assertionResults.title: should post monthly depreciation and stop at salvage value

ancestorTitles: Test 3: Declining balance depreciation works and approaches salvage value
assertionResults.fullName: Module 5 - Fixed Assets Acceptance Tests Test 3: Declining balance depreciation works and approaches salvage value should post declining depreciation each month
assertionResults.title: should post declining depreciation each month

ancestorTitles: Test 4: Idempotency - running depreciation twice for same month
assertionResults.fullName: Module 5 - Fixed Assets Acceptance Tests Test 4: Idempotency - running depreciation twice for same month should not create duplicate entries for the same period
assertionResults.title: should not create duplicate entries for the same period

ancestorTitles: Test 5: Disposal with proceeds > NBV posts a gain
assertionResults.fullName: Module 5 - Fixed Assets Acceptance Tests Test 5: Disposal with proceeds > NBV posts a gain should correctly post gain on disposal
assertionResults.title: should correctly post gain on disposal

ancestorTitles: Test 6: Disposal with proceeds < NBV posts a loss
assertionResults.fullName: Module 5 - Fixed Assets Acceptance Tests Test 6: Disposal with proceeds < NBV posts a loss should correctly post loss on disposal
assertionResults.title: should correctly post loss on disposal

ancestorTitles: Test 7: After disposal, NBV = 0 and status = disposed
assertionResults.fullName: Module 5 - Fixed Assets Acceptance Tests Test 7: After disposal, NBV = 0 and status = disposed should set NBV to 0 and status to disposed after disposal
assertionResults.title: should set NBV to 0 and status to disposed after disposal
